name: @chaafoo/anchored
description: Fractal lifecycle framework — plan/refine/build/wrap on every tier (phase/task/epic). CLI-only transport, no MCP.

scripts.test:e2e: files=$(find src -name '*.e2e.ts' | sed 's|^|./|'); if [ -n "$files" ]; then bun test $files; else echo 'no *.e2e.ts files — skipping'; fi
scripts.test:int: files=$(find src -name '*.int.ts' | sed 's|^|./|'); if [ -n "$files" ]; then bun test $files; else echo 'no *.int.ts files — skipping'; fi
scripts.test: npm run coverage:specs && npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:int
scripts.bundle:plugin: bun build src/bin.ts --target=node --outfile=../plugin/bin/anchored && chmod +x ../plugin/bin/anchored && mkdir -p ../plugin/default-template && cp default-template/anchored.default.yml ../plugin/default-template/anchored.default.yml && echo 'bundled → plugin/bin/anchored (+ default-template sidecar)'
